reviewer_sources.query: Go to https://www.pcmag.com/picks/the-best-password-managers and extract every password manager they recommend. For each product get: full product name, their award or category, rating, annual price for individual plan, free tier details, encryption type, platform support, key features, pros with specifics, cons.

Go to https://www.security.org/password-manager/best/ and extract every password manager they recommend. For each product get: full product name, their award or category, SecurityScore, annual price, free tier, encryption type, platform support, key features, pros with specifics, cons.

Go to https://www.zdnet.com/article/best-password-manager/ and extract every password manager they recommend. For each product get: full product name, their award or category, annual price, free tier details, encryption, platform support, key features, pros with specifics, cons.

Go to https://www.pcworld.com/article/407092/best-password-managers-reviews-and-buying-advice.html and extract every password manager they recommend. For each product get: full product name, their award or ranking, annual price, free tier, encryption, platform support, pros with specifics, cons.

Go to https://axis-intelligence.com/best-password-managers-2026-12-tools-tested/ and extract every password manager they compare. For each product get: full product name, their ranking or award, annual price, free tier, encryption type, platform support, key features, pros with specifics, cons.
